# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this pull request changes.

## Changed Areas

Check all that apply:

- [ ] README or root project files
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Prompts
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Workflows
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] Schemas
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Python examples
- [ ] Security, compliance, or license wording
- [ ] Other

## Review Field Alignment

If this PR changes prompts, templates, workflows, schemas, examples, or output records, confirm the standard fields are aligned:

- [ ] `risk_note`
- [ ] `risk_level`
- [ ] `confidence`
- [ ] `opportunity_score`
- [ ] `review_status`

Standard values:

```text
Risk Level: Low / Medium / High / Avoid / Unknown
Confidence: Low / Medium / High
Review Status: Draft / Needs Review / Approved / Rejected / Watchlist
```

## Safety and Compliance Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, cookies, private data, or credentials are included.
- [ ] No copied third-party source code without clear attribution and compatible license.
- [ ] No spam automation, fake engagement, private scraping, or deceptive automation is added.
- [ ] No guaranteed-profit, auto-money, or investment return claims are added.
- [ ] Human review remains part of the workflow.

## Testing / Validation

Check what you verified:

- [ ] Markdown renders correctly.
- [ ] Links are valid.
- [ ] CSV examples open correctly.
- [ ] JSON files parse correctly.
- [ ] JSON schemas validate correctly.
- [ ] Python examples pass syntax checks.
- [ ] Not applicable.

## Notes for Reviewers

Add any assumptions, limitations, or follow-up items.
